mapper.select:
SELECT a.track_id FROM tb_rcmmd_artist_track_list a JOIN tb_track b ON b.track_id = a.track_id AND b.disp_status_yn = 'Y' AND now() BETWEEN b.disp_start_dtime AND b.disp_end_dtime WHERE a.rcmmd_artist_id = (SELECT rcmmd_artist_id FROM tb_rcmmd_artist WHERE rcmmd_artist_id = #{rcmmdArtistId} )
ORDER BY a.disp_sn ASC LIMIT 30

SELECT a.track_id FROM tb_rcmmd_similar_track_list a JOIN tb_track b ON b.track_id = a.track_id AND b.disp_status_yn = 'Y' AND now() BETWEEN b.disp_start_dtime AND b.disp_end_dtime WHERE a.rcmmd_similar_track_id = (SELECT rcmmd_similar_track_id FROM tb_rcmmd_similar_track WHERE rcmmd_similar_track_id = #{rcmmdTrackId} ) ORDER BY a.disp_sn ASC

SELECT a.track_id FROM tb_rcmmd_prefer_genre_similar_track_list a JOIN tb_track b ON a.track_id = b.track_id AND b.disp_status_yn = 'Y' AND now() BETWEEN b.disp_start_dtime AND b.disp_end_dtime WHERE a.rcmmd_prefer_genre_similar_track_id = (SELECT rcmmd_prefer_genre_similar_track_id FROM tb_rcmmd_prefer_genre_similar_track WHERE rcmmd_prefer_genre_similar_track_id = #{rcmmdGenreId} ) ORDER BY a.disp_sn ASC

SELECT a.track_id FROM tb_rcmmd_mforu_list a JOIN tb_track b ON b.track_id = a.track_id AND b.disp_status_yn = 'Y' AND now() BETWEEN b.disp_start_dtime AND b.disp_end_dtime WHERE a.rcmmd_mforu_id = (SELECT rcmmd_mforu_id FROM tb_rcmmd_mforu WHERE rcmmd_mforu_id = #{rcmmdMforuId} ) ORDER BY a.disp_sn ASC

SELECT a.member_no memberNo, a.character_no characterNo, a.last_listen_dtime lastListenDateTime, a.listen_cnt listenCount, a.create_dtime createDateTime, a.update_dtime updateDateTime, a.track_id, a.track_nm trackNm, IF(f.like_type_id is null, 'N', 'Y') likeYn, a.track_play_tm playTime, a.adult_auth_need_track_yn adultAuthYn, a.track_subtrct_qty subtractQty, IF(a.title_yn = 'Y' , 'Y', 'N') titleYn, IF(a.streaming_premium_yn = 'Y' OR a.pps_yn = 'Y', 'Y', 'N') holdbackYn, a.agency_id agencyId, c.album_id, c.album_img_size size, c.album_img_url AS url, c.update_dtime albumImgUpdateDateTime, e.artist_id, e.artist_nm, a.disp_status_yn displayYn, a.title albumTitle, h.artist_id repArtistId, h.artist_nm repArtistNm, a.svc_flac_yn FROM ( SELECT aa.member_no member_no, aa.character_no character_no, aa.track_id track_id, aa.last_listen_dtime last_listen_dtime, aa.listen_cnt listen_cnt, aa.create_dtime, aa.update_dtime,
b.svc_flac_yn, b.track_play_tm, b.adult_auth_need_track_yn, b.track_subtrct_qty, b.title_yn, b.streaming_premium_yn, b.pps_yn, b.agency_id, b.track_nm, b.disp_status_yn, b.reprsnt_artist_id, g.title, g.album_id
FROM tb_most_listen_track aa INNER JOIN tb_track b ON aa.track_id = b.track_id AND b.disp_status_yn ='Y' AND now() BETWEEN b.disp_start_dtime AND b.disp_end_dtime INNER JOIN ted_album g ON b.album_id = g.album_id AND g.disp_status_yn ='Y' AND now() BETWEEN g.disp_start_dtime AND g.disp_end_dtime
WHERE character_no = #{characterNo} ORDER BY listen_cnt DESC, last_listen_dtime DESC LIMIT #{pageable.offset}, #{pageable.pageSize} ) a LEFT OUTER JOIN tb_character_like f ON a.track_id = f.like_type_id AND a.character_no = f.character_no AND like_type = 'TRACK' LEFT OUTER JOIN tb_album_img c ON a.album_id = c.album_id LEFT OUTER JOIN ted_trackartist as d ON a.track_id = d.track_id AND d.rp_yn = 'Y' LEFT OUTER JOIN ted_artist e ON d.artist_id = e.artist_id LEFT OUTER JOIN ted_artist h ON a.reprsnt_artist_id = h.artist_id ORDER BY listenCount DESC, lastListenDateTime DESC, d.listorder

SELECT count(DISTINCT a.track_id) FROM ( SELECT member_no member_no, character_no character_no, track_id track_id, last_listen_dtime last_listen_dtime, listen_cnt listen_cnt, create_dtime, update_dtime FROM tb_most_listen_track WHERE character_no = #{characterNo} ) a INNER JOIN tb_track b ON a.track_id = b.track_id AND b.disp_status_yn ='Y' AND now() BETWEEN b.disp_start_dtime AND b.disp_end_dtime LEFT OUTER JOIN tb_character_like f ON a.track_id = f.like_type_id AND a.character_no = f.character_no AND like_type = 'TRACK' LEFT OUTER JOIN tb_album_img c ON b.album_id = c.album_id LEFT OUTER JOIN ted_trackartist as d ON b.track_id = d.track_id AND d.rp_yn = 'Y' LEFT OUTER JOIN ted_artist e ON d.artist_id = e.artist_id INNER JOIN ted_album g ON b.album_id = g.album_id AND g.disp_status_yn ='Y' AND now() BETWEEN g.disp_start_dtime AND g.disp_end_dtime LEFT OUTER JOIN ted_artist h ON b.reprsnt_artist_id = h.artist_id

SELECT a.member_no AS memberNo, a.character_no AS characterNo, a.track_id, a.track_nm, a.track_play_tm AS playTime, IF(a.title_yn = 'Y' , 'Y', 'N') AS titleYn, a.adult_auth_need_track_yn AS adultAuthYn, a.track_subtrct_qty AS subtractQty, IF(a.streaming_premium_yn = 'Y' OR a.pps_yn = 'Y', 'Y', 'N') AS holdbackYn, a.agency_id, a.create_dtime AS createDateTime, a.update_dtime AS updateDateTime, c.album_id, c.album_img_size size, c.album_img_url AS url, a.last_listen_dtime AS lastListenDateTime, e.artist_id, e.artist_nm, a.disp_status_yn AS displayYn, IF(f.track_id is null, 'N', 'Y') AS likeYn, g.title AS albumTitle, h.artist_id AS repArtistId, h.artist_nm AS repArtistNm, a.svc_flac_yn FROM ( SELECT * FROM ( SELECT a.member_no, a.character_no, a.track_id, a.last_listen_dtime, b.track_nm, b.track_play_tm, b.title_yn, b.adult_auth_need_track_yn, b.track_subtrct_qty, b.streaming_premium_yn, b.disp_status_yn, b.pps_yn, b.agency_id, b.album_id, b.reprsnt_artist_id, b.create_dtime, b.update_dtime, b.svc_flac_yn FROM tb_most_listen_track a INNER JOIN tb_track b ON a.track_id = b.track_id AND b.disp_status_yn = 'Y' AND now() BETWEEN b.disp_start_dtime AND b.disp_end_dtime WHERE a.member_no = #{memberNo} AND a.character_no = #{characterNo} ORDER BY a.last_listen_dtime DESC LIMIT 500 ) aa LIMIT #{pageable.offset}, #{pageable.pageSize} ) a LEFT JOIN tb_album_img c ON a.album_id = c.album_id LEFT JOIN ted_trackartist as d ON a.track_id = d.track_id AND d.rp_yn = 'Y' LEFT JOIN ted_artist e ON d.artist_id = e.artist_id LEFT JOIN tb_map_track_like f ON a.track_id = f.track_id AND a.member_no = f.member_no INNER JOIN ted_album g ON a.album_id = g.album_id AND g.disp_status_yn ='Y' AND now() BETWEEN g.disp_start_dtime AND g.disp_end_dtime LEFT JOIN ted_artist h ON a.reprsnt_artist_id = h.artist_id ORDER BY a.last_listen_dtime DESC, d.listorder ASC

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ( SELECT a.track_id FROM tb_most_listen_track a INNER JOIN tb_track b ON a.track_id = b.track_id AND b.disp_status_yn = 'Y'AND now() BETWEEN b.disp_start_dtime AND b.disp_end_dtime WHERE a.member_no = #{memberNo} AND a.character_no = #{characterNo} LIMIT 500 ) a
